name: Incorrect Behavior Order: Early Amplification
description: The product allows an entity to perform a legitimate but expensive operation before authentication or authorization has taken place, enabling unauthenticated attackers to consume significant resources and cause denial of service.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node reaches a TRANSFORM node performing an expensive operation (cryptographic computation, database query, file I/O, large allocation) before passing through an AUTH node that validates the requester's identity or authorization
